certification_claim: Failure Atlas is TRUSTED (97.9% Verified, 889/908 entries)
summary: Aggregate data is trustworthy (verified by random sample audit, heuristic audit, attack simulation). Infrastructure has enforcement gaps (5/7 entry paths, no DB constraint, most consumers don't filter).

dimensions.finding: 5 of 7 entry creation paths do not set detection_classification explicitly. They rely on insert_entry() DEFAULT 'UNVERIFIED'. Vulnerable paths: orchestrator.py:835-848 (pipeline failures), orchestrator.py:860-882 (root causes), orchestrator.py:907-931 (signoff failures), cross_tool_drc.py:186 (cross-tool DRC), candidate.py:42 (resolution candidates).
detection_classification has notnull=0 — no NOT NULL constraint at SQLite level. DEFAULT 'UNVERIFIED' provides partial protection but explicit NULL insertion is allowed.

Only failure_coverage_matrix.py and readiness_engine.py filter by classification. growth_tracker.py, dashboard.py, quality_audit.py, profile_engine.py, resolution_intelligence/repository.py, and backend/server.py (30+ queries) do NOT filter.
dimensions.evidence: server.py, growth_tracker.py, dashboard.py, quality_audit.py, profile_engine.py, resolution_intelligence/repository.py

dimensions.finding: VERIFIED=889, HEURISTIC=19, TOTAL=908. Distribution matches certification claim exactly.
20 random VERIFIED entries examined: all have metric evidence (wns, tns, drc_violations, lvs_status, area, stage/error). 0 false verifications (0% false verification rate).
19 HEURISTIC entries examined: all have log_file + atlas_id in evidence (keyword-fallback pattern) and title starting with 'Log signature:'. 0 misclassified.
0 entries with classification=NULL, '', 'unknown', or any value other than VERIFIED or HEURISTIC.
9 mutation-sensitive tests. Forcing KEYWORD_FALLBACK→EXACT_MATCH causes 2 test failures. Forcing EXACT_MATCH→KEYWORD_FALLBACK would cause 1 test failure.
Log with only EDA keywords produces _detection_method=KEYWORD_FALLBACK, which maps to detection_classification=HEURISTIC. Keyword-only logs cannot become VERIFIED.
failure_coverage_matrix.py and readiness_engine.py both filter by detection_classification. Coverage engine uses min_classification param with WHERE clause. Readiness engine uses same pattern.
dimensions.evidence: Phase 10 dataset readiness audit, failure_coverage_matrix.py:42-54, readiness_engine.py:27-61
